name: globalstorage-composer-disk-kv
description: Modern Cursor (3.0+) stores composer chats in <userDir>/globalStorage/state.vscdb in a cursorDiskKV table with composerData:<id> header rows (containing fullConversationHeadersOnly: ordered bubble id list) and bubbleId:<composerId>:<bubbleId> per-message rows. Conversation order comes from the header array, NOT bubble timestamps. Encode session ids as 'global:composer-<id>' to keep the one-colon isSafeSessionId contract.

content: Cursor reader: legacy toolCalls/tool_calls array preserves name='unknown' fallback for missing names; modern toolFormerData/capabilitiesRan paths drop nameless entries since the modern schema is loose. Use allowUnknownName flag on the shared toolCallFromRecord helper.
